title: Options Flow Scraper
description: Configure which type of options data to fetch from Barchart.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
Choose what to scrape:
- **unusual-activity**: Market-wide scan for contracts with abnormally high volume vs open interest (smart money signals).
- **options-chain**: Full options chain for one or more tickers.
- **ticker-flow**: Intraday trade-by-trade flow for a specific ticker.

tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description: List of stock tickers to fetch data for. Required for 'options-chain' and 'ticker-flow' modes. Example: ["AAPL", "NVDA", "SPY"]

underlyingType.title: Underlying Type
underlyingType.description: Filter unusual activity results by underlying asset type. Only applies to 'unusual-activity' mode.

optionType.title: Option Type
optionType.description: Filter results to calls only, puts only, or both.

minVolumeOIRatio.title: Minimum Volume/OI Ratio
minVolumeOIRatio.description: Only return contracts where volume divided by open interest is above this threshold. Higher values = more unusual activity. Recommended: 1.5 or above.

minPremium.title: Minimum Total Premium ($)
minPremium.description: Only return contracts where total premium (price × volume × 100) exceeds this dollar amount. Filters out small retail trades. Example: 50000 = $50k minimum.

expirationDate.title: Expiration Date
expirationDate.description: Filter options chain to a specific expiration date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave blank to return all expirations. Only applies to 'options-chain' mode.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Useful for cost control.
